title: Upload multiple supported files and see them listed
description: Verifies a user can upload multiple supported documents and that they appear in My Data with an initial processing status.

steps.description: Navigate to /#my-data
Add multiple supported files using the file picker (include a PDF, a TXT, and a DOCX).
Wait for the upload progress notification to appear.
Wait for the upload progress notification to finish.
Verify the uploaded files appear in the My Data file list.
Verify each uploaded file shows a processing status badge.

title: View organized clusters after running organization
description: Verifies the user can upload multiple supported documents, run organization, and then see cluster cards rendered in Collections view.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Upload multiple supported files (choose at least three across PDF/TXT/DOCX) using the file picker
Wait for the upload progress to complete
Run the AI organization action
Wait for organization to complete
Click the Collections navigation item in the sidebar
Verify cluster cards are displayed with a title, a summary preview, a member count, and importance/primary indicators

title: Ask a question and see sourced answer with sources panel
description: Verifies the user can submit a chat question and receive an answer that includes inline citations and a sources panel with retrieval details.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Upload multiple supported files using the file picker
Wait for the upload progress to complete
Run the AI organization action
Wait for organization to complete
Click the AI Chat navigation item in the sidebar
Fill a question that requires using multiple documents into the chat input
Submit the question
Open the sources panel
Verify the AI answer is displayed with inline source references and the sources panel lists selected sources with retrieval mode and reasoning

title: Switch between My Data, Collections, and AI Chat with correct active state and persistent stats
description: Verifies the user can navigate between the three main pages and the sidebar active state and storage stats remain visible and consistent.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the sidebar item for My Data
Click the sidebar item for Collections
Click the sidebar item for AI Chat
Verify the AI Chat page content is displayed and the AI Chat nav item is active
Verify storage statistics are visible in the sidebar footer

title: Run Organize with AI and reach Collections with clusters
description: Verifies a user can manually run AI organization and then see resulting clusters in Collections.

steps.description: Navigate to /#my-data
Add multiple supported files using the file picker.
Wait for the upload progress notification to finish.
Trigger AI organization.
Wait for the organization loading spinner to disappear.
Click to open Collections from the navigation.
Verify cluster cards are displayed in Collections.

title: Upload supported file via drag-and-drop
description: Verifies a user can drag and drop a supported file onto the drop zone and it uploads and appears in the file list.

steps.description: Navigate to /#my-data
Drag and drop a supported file onto the upload drop zone.
Wait for the upload progress notification to appear.
Wait for the upload progress notification to finish.
Verify the dropped file appears in the My Data file list.

title: View file metadata and delete a file with stats update
description: Verifies a user can see file metadata in My Data and delete a file so it disappears and storage stats update.

steps.description: Navigate to /#my-data
Add a supported file using the file picker.
Wait for the upload progress notification to finish.
Note the current storage stats values.
Delete the newly uploaded file from the file list.
Verify the deleted file is no longer shown in the My Data file list.
Verify the storage stats have updated to reflect the deletion.

title: Open a file summary from a cluster
description: Verifies the user can open a file inside a cluster from Collections and see a detailed summary panel.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Upload multiple supported files using the file picker
Wait for the upload progress to complete
Run the AI organization action
Wait for organization to complete
Click the Collections navigation item in the sidebar
Open a file from within a displayed cluster
Verify a file summary panel opens showing a detailed markdown-style summary for the selected file

title: Sources reference items that exist in user data views
description: Verifies that sources shown for a chat answer correspond to items that can be found in Collections or My Data views.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Upload multiple supported files using the file picker
Wait for the upload progress to complete
Run the AI organization action
Wait for organization to complete
Click the AI Chat navigation item in the sidebar
Fill a question into the chat input and submit it
Open the sources panel
Click a listed source item to navigate to its corresponding file or cluster context if supported
Verify the UI reveals the referenced item in a data view context (file or cluster) rather than showing an unresolved reference

title: Close file summary panel using a close action
description: Verifies the user can close an opened file summary panel and return to the collections list view.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Upload multiple supported files using the file picker
Wait for the upload progress to complete
Run the AI organization action
Wait for organization to complete
Click the Collections navigation item in the sidebar
Open a file from within a displayed cluster
Close the file summary panel using the panel close control
Verify the file summary panel is no longer visible and the collections view is visible

title: Storage stats remain visible and update across page switches
description: Verifies storage statistics remain visible while switching pages and display numeric values on each page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the sidebar item for My Data
Click the sidebar item for Collections
Click the sidebar item for AI Chat
Verify storage statistics are visible in the sidebar footer on the current page
Verify the file, cluster, and processed counts display as numbers

title: Processing status transitions after organization completes
description: Verifies that after running organization, file status badges in My Data reflect a post-organization state.

steps.description: Navigate to /#my-data
Add a supported file using the file picker.
Wait for the upload progress notification to finish.
Trigger AI organization.
Wait for the organization loading spinner to disappear.
Verify the uploaded file shows an organized or ready status badge.

title: Upload many supported files in one batch
description: Verifies a power user can upload a larger batch of supported files at once and they all appear in the file list.

steps.description: Navigate to /#my-data
Add a larger batch of supported files using the file picker (select many files).
Wait for the upload progress notification to finish.
Verify multiple newly uploaded files appear in the My Data file list.

title: Cluster cards show per-file importance labels and primary indicator
description: Verifies that after organization, files listed within a cluster show an importance label and a primary indicator where applicable.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Upload multiple supported files using the file picker
Wait for the upload progress to complete
Run the AI organization action
Wait for organization to complete
Click the Collections navigation item in the sidebar
Verify at least one cluster shows files with importance labels and that a primary indicator is present for a primary file

title: Show completion notification after organizing
description: Verifies the app shows a completion notification after an AI organization run finishes.

steps.description: Navigate to /#my-data
Add a supported file using the file picker.
Wait for the upload progress notification to finish.
Trigger AI organization.
Wait for the organization loading spinner to disappear.
Verify an organization completion notification is visible.

title: Suggested question chip submits and returns sourced answer
description: Verifies the user can click a suggested question chip and receive an AI response with inline citations.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Upload multiple supported files using the file picker
Wait for the upload progress to complete
Run the AI organization action
Wait for organization to complete
Click the AI Chat navigation item in the sidebar
Select a suggested question chip
Submit the populated question
Verify an AI response is displayed that includes inline source references

title: Show processing status badges for uploaded files
description: Verifies the My Data list displays processing status badges for uploaded files.

steps.description: Navigate to /#my-data
Add a supported file using the file picker.
Wait for the upload progress notification to finish.
Verify the file row displays filename, file type, upload time, text length, and a processing status badge.

title: Collections view remains usable after switching between pages
description: Verifies the user can navigate between My Data, Collections, and AI Chat and return to Collections with clusters still visible.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Upload multiple supported files using the file picker
Wait for the upload progress to complete
Run the AI organization action
Wait for organization to complete
Click the Collections navigation item in the sidebar
Click the AI Chat navigation item in the sidebar
Click the Collections navigation item in the sidebar
Verify cluster cards are still displayed in Collections view

title: Direct-load My Data via hash route shows correct page and active state
description: Verifies loading the app directly on the My Data hash route displays My Data with the correct active nav item and visible stats.

steps.description: Navigate to /#my-data
Verify the My Data page content is displayed and the My Data nav item is active
Verify storage statistics are visible in the sidebar footer

title: Organization shows loading state while running
description: Verifies that starting AI organization displays a loading spinner while the process runs.

steps.description: Navigate to /#my-data
Add a supported file using the file picker.
Wait for the upload progress notification to finish.
Trigger AI organization.
Verify an organization loading spinner is visible.

title: Summary panel displays key summary sections
description: Verifies the file summary panel shows a markdown-style summary with key topics, key facts, and importance/suggested usage information.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Upload multiple supported files using the file picker
Wait for the upload progress to complete
Run the AI organization action
Wait for organization to complete
Click the Collections navigation item in the sidebar
Open a file from within a displayed cluster
Verify the summary panel shows sections for topics/facts and includes importance and suggested usage details

title: Upload a supported markdown file
description: Verifies uploading a supported markdown document succeeds and it appears in the My Data file list.

steps.description: Navigate to /#my-data
Add a supported markdown file using the file picker.
Wait for the upload progress notification to finish.
Verify the markdown file appears in the My Data file list.

title: Close file summary panel with Escape key
description: Verifies the user can dismiss the file summary panel with the Escape key and return to Collections.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Upload multiple supported files using the file picker
Wait for the upload progress to complete
Run the AI organization action
Wait for organization to complete
Click the Collections navigation item in the sidebar
Open a file from within a displayed cluster
Press Escape
Verify the file summary panel is no longer visible

title: Prevent organization when there are no files
description: Verifies triggering AI organization with no uploaded files shows a warning and does not start organization.

steps.description: Navigate to /#my-data
If any files are present, delete them until the file list is empty.
Trigger AI organization.
Verify a warning is visible indicating there are no files to organize.

title: Collections empty state when no clusters exist
description: Verifies that visiting Collections before any organization shows an empty state guiding the user to upload files and run organization.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the Collections navigation item in the sidebar
Verify an empty state is displayed indicating there are no collections yet and guidance is provided to upload files and organize

title: Pending summary shows placeholder state
description: Verifies that opening a file whose summary is not yet generated shows a pending placeholder rather than a broken panel.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Upload a supported file using the file picker
Wait for the upload progress to complete
Click the Collections navigation item in the sidebar
If clusters are available, open a file that indicates it is not fully summarized yet
Verify the summary panel shows a placeholder indicating the summary is pending

title: Rapid navigation switching does not leave multiple pages visible
description: Verifies quickly switching between nav items results in only the selected page being shown and the active state matching it.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the sidebar item for Collections
Click the sidebar item for My Data
Click the sidebar item for AI Chat
Verify only the AI Chat page content is displayed and other page contents are not displayed
Verify the AI Chat nav item is active

title: Block upload of unsupported file type
description: Verifies the app prevents uploading an unsupported file type and shows a validation error without adding it to the list.

steps.description: Navigate to /#my-data
Add an unsupported file type using the file picker (for example, an image file).
Verify a file type validation error is visible.
Verify no new item is added to the My Data file list for the unsupported file.

title: Empty question validation in chat
description: Verifies that submitting an empty chat question is blocked and the UI prompts the user to enter a question.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the AI Chat navigation item in the sidebar
Submit the question with the chat input left empty
Verify a validation prompt is shown indicating a question is required and no new AI message is added
